description: Composition100% cotton black full sleeved shirt with white and grey stripes, black stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, embroidered seal on left chest, embroidered lettering on right chest, snap button on both elbows, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this striped shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
